# Skylos Documentation

> Documentation for Skylos, an open-source static analysis tool for Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, Go, PHP, and Rust. Detects dead code, security vulnerabilities (SQL injection, SSRF, XSS, command injection, secrets), and code quality issues with framework-aware analysis.

Skylos is a Vulture alternative with 95% recall and 3x fewer false positives. Built-in awareness for Django, Flask, FastAPI, Pydantic, and pytest. Available as CLI, MCP server, VS Code extension, and GitHub Action.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://docs.skylos.dev/installation): Install via pip, system requirements, Python 3.10+
- [Quick Start](https://docs.skylos.dev/quick-start): Step-by-step workflow guide
- [Configuration](https://docs.skylos.dev/configuration): Configure via pyproject.toml — exclusions, thresholds, quality gates
- [CLI Reference](https://docs.skylos.dev/cli-reference): All command-line flags and options

## Core Features

- [Dead Code Detection](https://docs.skylos.dev/dead-code-detection): Find unused functions, imports, classes, and variables
- [Security Analysis](https://docs.skylos.dev/security-analysis): SAST with taint analysis for SQL injection, SSRF, XSS, command injection, path traversal
- [Code Quality](https://docs.skylos.dev/code-quality): Complexity, nesting depth, mutable defaults, standards-backed practice rules, and advisory quality rollout
- [Technical Debt](https://docs.skylos.dev/technical-debt): Structural debt hotspots, baseline comparison, and changed-scope reviews
- [Framework Awareness](https://docs.skylos.dev/framework-awareness): Django, Flask, FastAPI, Pydantic, and pytest recognition to reduce false positives
- [Smart Tracing](https://docs.skylos.dev/smart-tracing): Runtime call tracing for dynamic code

## Integrations

- [CI/CD Integration](https://docs.skylos.dev/ci-cd): GitHub Actions, advisory quality checks, GitLab CI, Jenkins setup with quality gates
- [VS Code Extension](https://docs.skylos.dev/vscode): Real-time analysis in the editor
- [MCP Server](https://docs.skylos.dev/mcp-server): Connect to Claude Desktop, Cursor, and AI assistants via Model Context Protocol
- [Claude Code Security](https://docs.skylos.dev/integrations/claude-code-security): Security ingestion for Claude Code

## Concepts

- [Taint Analysis](https://docs.skylos.dev/concepts/taint-analysis): How Skylos traces untrusted data through code
- [Pattern Detection](https://docs.skylos.dev/concepts/pattern-detection): Rule-based detection patterns
- [Vibe Coding Detection](https://docs.skylos.dev/concepts/vibe-coding): Detecting AI-generated code risks

## Reference

- [Rules Reference](https://docs.skylos.dev/rules-reference): All detection rules with IDs and severity
- [Benchmarks](https://docs.skylos.dev/case-studies): Skylos vs Vulture on 9 top Python repos (350k+ stars)
- [FAQ](https://docs.skylos.dev/faq): Common questions and troubleshooting

## Optional

- [AI Features](https://docs.skylos.dev/ai-features): LLM-powered auto-fix and audit
- [Quality Gate](https://docs.skylos.dev/quality-gate): Threshold-based merge blocking
- [TypeScript Support](https://docs.skylos.dev/typescript-support): TypeScript, JavaScript, and monorepo analysis
- [Cloud Dashboard](https://docs.skylos.dev/cloud): Skylos Cloud features
- [Enterprise Trust](https://docs.skylos.dev/enterprise-trust): Security-team pilot posture, upload attribution, audit events, RBAC, and procurement roadmap
- [Authentication](https://docs.skylos.dev/authentication): Browser login, project API keys, GitHub OIDC, and upload attribution
- [Billing](https://docs.skylos.dev/billing): Credit packs and pricing
